name: LINDE PLC
business: Linde is the largest industrial gas company worldwide, supplying atmospheric gases (oxygen, nitrogen, argon, rare gases) and process gases (hydrogen, helium, carbon dioxide, carbon monoxide, electronic gases, specialty gases, acetylene), and also designs and builds industrial gas production equipment.

exposures.sentence: Its primary products in its industrial gases business are atmospheric gases (oxygen, nitrogen, argon, and rare gases) and process gases (hydrogen, helium, carbon dioxide, carbon monoxide, electronic gases, specialty gases, and acetylene).
Linde has a range of technologies to produce low-carbon hydrogen from fossil feedstocks, or renewable hydrogen from renewable energy (non-fossil feedstock).
Its digital services and solutions increase plant efficiency and performance.

Linde’s oxyfuel combustion technology is a significant advancement in industrial combustion processes offering enhanced efficiency, higher productivity, reduced emissions and effective carbon capture solutions across various industries including metals, glass, refining and chemicals processes.
